title: neohouzeaua puberula
intro: Neohouzeaua puberula, a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, is native to the tropical forests of Borneo and is also known as the 'velvety houzeaua'. The medicinal properties of Neohouzeaua puberula include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. This plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Neohouzeaua puberula can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
